类 HttpFileViewBase

java.lang.Object
com.gdxsoft.web.http.HttpFileViewBase
直接已知子类:
HttpOaFileView, HttpOaSysAttView, OAFileView
public class HttpFileViewBase extends Object
下载或在线查看oa文件
在调用程序里在requst.setAttribute(\"pdfjs\", \"/xxx/pdfjs-1.10.100-dist/web/viewer.html\")

      allowDownload - 允许下载
      ifNoneMatch - 304检查头
